videos.title: Expose your site's actions to AI agents using WebMCP
videos.summary: Tired of AI agents failing when trying to navigate complex website interfaces? This video introduces WebMCP, a game-changing tool that lets websites explicitly share their capabilities with AI agents using plain JavaScript or HTML, eliminating the guesswork of scraping. Learn how to bridge the gap between web applications and AI agents for seamless, error-free automation.

timestamps.topic: The problem with AI agents navigating website UIs
Introducing WebMCP and registering tools with JavaScript
How WebMCP shifts from scraping to explicit capabilities

videos.title: How are large language models trained?
videos.summary: Demystify the complex world of artificial intelligence with this engaging guide on how large language models (LLMs) are trained. From raw data ingestion during pre-training to behavioral alignment in post-training, this video breaks down the technical engineering and evaluation processes that turn next-token predictors into helpful, safe assistants. It's an essential watch for anyone looking to understand the mechanics behind modern AI tools without getting lost in dense academic jargon.

timestamps.topic: The mechanics and scaling challenges of LLM pre-training
Comparing Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL)
How to measure LLM success and use an 'Autorater' for evaluation

videos.title: “The boogeyman in Malaysian politics is DAP not PAS.” - Anthony Loke | In The Studio
videos.summary: This video features an insightful interview with Malaysia's Minister of Transport, Anthony Loke, discussing the country's complex domestic political landscape and international diplomatic strategies. Viewers will gain a clear understanding of how Malaysia navigates relations with major global powers like the US, Europe, and Russia while prioritizing its own national interests. The core takeaway is the critical role of pragmatic, multipolar diplomacy and resilient coalition governance in maintaining stability.

timestamps.topic: PM Anwar Ibrahim's International Relations and Diplomatic Strengths
Pragmatic Diplomacy and Balancing Relationships with Global Powers

videos.title: “Either you were conned or your staff must be stupid” – Upin Ipin creator on theme park deal
videos.summary: Step into the studio with Hj Burhanuddin Md Radzi, the visionary founder of Les' Copaque Production, as he shares the fascinating journey of creating Malaysia's iconic animation franchise, "Upin & Ipin." This interview offers a masterclass in creative entrepreneurship, explaining how to build a sustainable global brand using Disney's business model while prioritizing creative control over quick financial exits.

timestamps.topic: Transitioning from Oil & Gas to Cartoon Animation
Why Creative Companies Should Avoid an IPO
Applying the Disney Business Model to Animation

videos.title: EP205 | PRN Johor 2026: Post-Match Analysis
videos.summary: This episode of the 'Keluar Sekejap' podcast offers a masterclass in political analysis, dissecting Barisan Nasional's landslide victory in the Johor State Elections. By breaking down complex voter turnout data and ethnic voting patterns, the hosts reveal the core strategic blunders of Pakatan Harapan and how turnout disparity became BN's ultimate weapon. It is a must-watch for anyone wanting to understand the real, data-driven mechanics behind Malaysian electoral shifts.

timestamps.topic: Overview of the Johor Election Results
Voter Turnout and Support Analysis
The Oracle: Ken Ming's Accurate Election Prediction

videos.title: His top book recs for SWEs in 2026
videos.summary: In this video, Xavier Leroy, the creator of the OCaml programming language, shares his top book recommendations for software engineers looking to elevate their coding skills. He dives into two classic, timeless books that teach not just syntax, but the fundamental mindset, elegance, and design principles used by expert programmers.

timestamps.topic: Programming Pearls by Jon Bentley
How to Design Programs

videos.title: Get started with the Interactions API
videos.summary: This video introduces the newly released Interactions API, a unified and stateful interface for Gemini models and agents that dramatically simplifies AI app development. You will watch a live demonstration of a coding assistant building and running an iterative, voice-controlled photo editing app from scratch using this powerful API. The core takeaway is how the stateful nature of the API allows developers to easily maintain context across multiple user interactions, saving both time and token costs.

timestamps.topic: Introduction to the unified Interactions API
Live demo of stateful image editing and branching

videos.title: Beli emas dengan Pos ArRahnu Gold-i
videos.summary: Whether you prefer the tangible feel of physical gold or the convenience of digital savings, this video breaks down how Pos ArRahnu Gold-i offers the best of both worlds with low entry barriers and secure backing. Discover how you can start investing with as little as RM10 on a trusted, Shariah-compliant platform backed by Pos Malaysia's extensive network.

timestamps.topic: Physical vs. Digital Gold: Understanding Your Preferences
Key Benefits of Pos ArRahnu Gold-i
Flexibility and Trustworthiness of the Platform

videos.title: [S01:E17] Dipaksa buat personal loan, akhirnya tanggung hutang seorang diri.
videos.summary: Planning to buy your first home but feeling overwhelmed by the process? This highly practical guide breaks down the essential three-point checklist every first-time buyer needs, including a simple formula to calculate your safe monthly budget. It's an invaluable watch for young adults wanting to navigate property and loan approvals with confidence.

timestamps.topic: The three-point checklist for first-time homebuyers
Calculating your home budget using the 1/3 net salary rule

videos.title: Intelligence vs. Wisdom in Islam (And What Iblis Teaches Us) | Snapshots with Imam Tom Facchine
videos.summary: As an analytical software engineer, it is easy to over-index on raw intelligence. This compelling Islamic lecture teaches you how to temper intellectual drive with divine wisdom—essential guidance for making ethical and sustainable decisions early in your career.

videos.title: How one financial choice can reshape a bloodline | Reni Eniola | TEDxMississauga
videos.summary: This inspiring TEDx talk explores how a single parent's decision to break the silence around money can fundamentally alter a family's financial destiny across generations. Through her personal journey of buying a home at 23, the speaker illustrates how teaching practical financial habits to children early on creates a compounding 'ripple effect' of wealth and confidence. It is a must-watch for anyone looking to overcome generational financial anxiety and empower the next generation with the gift of financial literacy.

timestamps.topic: Breaking the silence on generational money fears
How small financial habits compound over time
Redefining financial literacy as opportunity and choice

videos.title: Why Building a Business Is Quietly Destroying Your Iman as a Muslim Man
videos.summary: This video is a powerful wake-up call for high-performing Muslim professionals who struggle to balance business success with spiritual devotion. Abdullah Oduro explains how neglecting or rushing Salah (prayer) slowly erodes one's spiritual health and family relationships, offering a roadmap to reconnect with Allah. By prioritizing prayer times and cultivating mindfulness (Khushū'), professionals can build a stronger foundation for both worldly and ultimate success.

timestamps.topic: Prioritizing Prescribed Prayer Times over Business Meetings
Finding Spiritual Nourishment and Focus in Prayer
The Danger of Rushed Prayers and Heart Hardening

videos.title: What Senior Engineers do Differently (Vercel VP)
videos.summary: Gain insider knowledge from the VP of Vercel on the exact habits, communication strategies, and technical decision-making skills that distinguish senior engineers. It’s the ultimate roadmap for a junior fullstack developer aiming to accelerate their career and understand how software is scaled globally.

videos.title: You Didn't Ship a Bug. You Just Wrote It for a Human. - Ravi Madabhushi, Scalekit
videos.summary: As AI agents increasingly interact with our APIs, traditional security architectures built for human users are showing serious cracks. This video explains why treating AI agents like standard users or broad service accounts leads to dangerous security loopholes and database strains. The core takeaway is a blueprint for building robust, first-class "on-behalf-of" authentication layers tailored specifically for non-deterministic AI workflows.

timestamps.topic: The flaw of forcing AI agents into human or service account roles
How non-deterministic AI agents break traditional authorization
Designing a first-class 'on-behalf-of' security layer for AI

videos.title: Ask Allah To Change YOU Instead | LATEST Khutbah by Dr. Omar Suleiman
videos.summary: In this inspiring sermon, Dr. Omar Suleiman calls for a profound paradigm shift in our supplications, urging believers to focus on asking Allah to change their inner hearts rather than just their outer circumstances. By highlighting powerful prophetic prayers, he demonstrates how true contentment is achieved when we align our personal desires with the Divine will. This video is a must-watch for anyone seeking to elevate their spiritual practice and find genuine peace in life's ups and downs.

timestamps.topic: The Difference Between Asking for Firmness and Asking for Divine Direction
A Prophetic Dua for Aligning Your Desires with Allah's Will
